problem id: e368d23f
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHR(1)

examples:
  11011001 -> 01101100
  10100100 -> 01010010
  01110001 -> 00111000
  01010100 -> 00101010
  00100111 -> 00010011
  01111100 -> 00111110
  10110110 -> 01011011
  11010010 -> 01101001
  00111100 -> 00011110
  01101011 -> 00110101

query: 00011010
predicted answer: 00001101
